purpose: Branch governance and execution map for turning the HUB public index into a repeatable SEO/submission operating system.

rules.main: Protected public release branch. Only validated releases and hotfixes land here.
rules.develop: Integration branch for generator, index, and documentation work before release candidates.
rules.route/*: External platform routes such as GitHub Topics, Open Hub, SourceForge, AlternativeTo, and awesome-list prep.
rules.submission/*: Directory/list submission branches with evidence notes and tracking updates.
rules.seo/*: Public index, sitemap, schema, metadata, social-card, link-graph, and LLM-index improvements.
rules.arc/*: ARC source-spine, local AI, LLM, runtime, archive, and governance routes.
rules.release/*: Release-candidate freeze branches after validation passes.
rules.hotfix/*: Small emergency corrections only: broken links, invalid JSON, sitemap errors, public page failures.

activeBranches.name: seo/public-index-v8-branching
activeBranches.purpose: Add branch governance, validation, branch-map data, and public branch pages.

activeBranches.name: submission/libhunt-arc-graph
activeBranches.purpose: Finish LibHunt alternatives graph for ARC-Neuron, ARC-Core, Lucifer Runtime, arc-language-module, and Arc-RAR.

activeBranches.name: submission/libhunt-tizwildin-audio-graph
activeBranches.purpose: Finish LibHunt alternatives graph for FreeEQ8, TizWildinEntertainmentHUB, FreeVox8, and awesome-audio-plugins-dev.

activeBranches.name: route/github-topics-cleanup
activeBranches.purpose: Normalize topic tags across the 9 first-wave repos and the wave-2 audio support repos.

activeBranches.name: route/openhub-sourceforge
activeBranches.purpose: Prepare Open Hub and SourceForge project/mirror records for ARC and TizWildin repos.

activeBranches.name: route/awesome-lists
activeBranches.purpose: Prepare PR-ready descriptions for local AI, self-hosted, audio DSP, JUCE, music production, and awesome-list indexes.

activeBranches.name: arc/source-spine-index
activeBranches.purpose: Expand ARC route pages with internal doctrine, repo relationships, and submission targets.

activeBranches.name: audio/tizwildin-directory-index
activeBranches.purpose: Index audio directories, plugin directories, sample-pack routes, and review/editorial targets for FreeEQ8 and the HUB.

activeBranches.name: release/public-index-v8
activeBranches.purpose: Freeze v8 after branch governance, LibHunt graph notes, and directory route maps are validated.

mergePolicy: Every branch must update source manifests or docs, then rebuild public index.
Every branch must pass public-index validation and branch-map validation before merge.
No generated page should be hand-edited unless the generator is updated or the file is intentionally static.
Every submission branch must save evidence notes before status changes from queued to submitted.
main only receives develop/release branches after all validators pass.
